query: MBP human dorsolateral prefrontal cortex marker

results.title: Evidence for a wide extra-astrocytic distribution of S100B in human brain
results.snippet: S100B is considered an astrocytic in-situ marker and protein levels in cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) or serum are often used as biomarker for astrocytic damage or dysfunction.

results.title: Novel implications of Lingo-1 and its signaling partners in schizophrenia
results.snippet: We examined protein levels of Lingo-1, NgR, TROY, p75, WNK1, Myt1 and myelin basic protein (MBP) (as a marker of myelination) within the post-mortem dorsolateral prefrontal cortex (DLPFC) (37 schizophrenia patients versus 37 matched controls) and hippocampus (Cornu Ammonis, CA1 and CA3) (20 schizophrenia patients versu

results.title: Changes in glial gene expression in the prefrontal cortex in relation to major depressive disorder, suicide and psychotic features
results.snippet: To establish whether major depressive disorder (MDD), suicidal behaviors and psychotic features contribute to glial alterations in the human prefrontal cortex.

results.title: Association between golli-MBP and schizophrenia in the Jewish Ashkenazi population: are regulatory regions involved?
results.snippet: One of these genes is the myelin-basic-protein (MBP) gene, which encodes two families of proteins: classic-MBPs and golli-MBPs.
